versions.title: Terms of Service
versions.content:
## Terms of Service

Welcome to **Blue Dots**, a digital network — seeded by EkStep Foundation — that helps opportunity seekers, providers, and aggregators discover and connect with one another.

### 1. Who can use Blue Dots
Blue Dots is currently **invite-only**. By continuing you confirm that you are at least 18 years old and that any information you provide is accurate and belongs to you or to an organisation you are authorised to represent.

### 2. What Blue Dots is
Blue Dots is a **discovery and matching network**. We help you find relevant opportunities, jobs, and providers and make your profile discoverable to relevant participants. We are **not a party** to any engagement, employment, or transaction that results — those are solely between the participants involved.

### 3. Your responsibilities
- Keep your profile accurate and up to date.
- Use the network lawfully and treat other participants with respect.
- Do not misuse contact details you receive, or share them beyond the purpose for which they were shared.

### 4. Suspension
We may pause or remove access for misuse, fraudulent listings, or activity that harms other participants.

### 5. Service "as is"
Blue Dots is in active development and is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis, without warranties. We work to keep it reliable but cannot guarantee uninterrupted service.

### 6. Governing law
These terms are governed by the laws of India. Questions or grievances: **hello@bluedotseconomy.org**.

versions.title: Privacy Policy
versions.content:
## Privacy Policy

This policy explains what **Blue Dots** (seeded by EkStep Foundation) collects, why, and the choices you have. We collect only what is needed to connect you with the right opportunities.

### What we collect
- **Contact details** — your name, email, and phone number.
- **Profile information** you choose to provide — such as your role, skills, experience, and location.
- **Activity** on the network — the connections and applications you make.

### Why we use it
We use your information to **match you with relevant opportunities, jobs, and providers**, and to make your profile discoverable to relevant participants within the network.

### When your contact details are shared
Your name, email, and phone number are shared with another seeker or organisation **only when you initiate or accept a connection or application** — and, for applications, only once it is accepted. **We never sell your data** or share it for advertising.

### Your control
You can **update** your profile from the portal at any time. To have your information removed, contact us at **hello@bluedotseconomy.org**.

### Retention
We keep your information only for as long as it is needed to connect you within the network.

### Grievances
For any privacy question or request, contact **hello@bluedotseconomy.org**.
